posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Michal from spotnik here, I wanted to let you know of a new feature on our SuperForm App!
We already know super form can fetch data from other boards using the connect boards column, but then if we want to do any automations on this we can’t…
So now we have a new way to fetch data from other boards without having the limitations of connected boards.
Enjoy my video explaining the feature and how to use it-

posts.author: thehousemanager (Cat)
posts.cookedHtml: Michael, How can I share the SuperForm in Wordpress? I see there is a URL but I am looking for the code to embed.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: thehousemanager (Cat)
posts.cookedHtml:
That is the problem. I can’t find the iframe code like I can on the other forms. It just gives a URL.

Where is the iframe code located?

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
Can you send me the url? I will send you the iframe code with the url.
otherwise you can put the url by yourself in this code

notice the bold is what you need to set by yourself. Hope this helps Best
